name: My Sassy Princess: Snow White
overview:
A re-imagination of the classic tale Snow White in modern society.

Snow White's beauty was once her danger. But for the Snow White of the new era, "Ugliness" is more threatening. Because she's not fair, not thin, nothing according to Beauty Standards, she is attacked by the sweet-but-toxic social media. No matter how much she's bullied, this "Poisoned Apple" won't be her death!

trailers.title: สโนว์ไวท์เวอร์ชันนี้ ไม่เหมือนเดิม!! | My Sassy Princess : สโนว์ไวท์ 2022 | เริ่ม 15 ต.ค.นี้ | one31
